title: UI, e2e, operations and handoff
objective: Complete operator/user UI, e2e checks and documentation for file source auto organization.
write_scope: .desc.json files and PROJECT_STRUCTURE.yaml if structure changes
non_goals: Do not expose sensitive evidence, raw paths or raw content in UI.
Do not skip e2e for physical transfer safety.
Do not archive the workflow before owner acceptance.
requirements: UI must show baseline preview, incoming review, organization proposals, move plan diff and job status.
UI write actions must go through server-side services with permissions and audit.
E2E must cover baseline, incoming, proposal approval, move safety and access control.
Operations docs must describe retention, backup checkpoint and failure handling.
acceptance_checks: Operator can review baseline without physical file changes.
Operator can approve or reject organization proposal.
Move plan diff shows affected files, source, target, confidence and rollback/quarantine status.
E2E proves a user virtual view does not grant access to restricted files.
